text: I'm really frustrated with how long it took to get my order. I expected better service than this.
I ordered a pair of shoes, but I received a shirt instead. Can you send me the shoes or give a refund?
my username is wrong in the app, and there's no way to change it. can you fix this?

Hi there, I'm just wondering about the specifics of how to retrieve my account information when my email is linked to a different place now? Also, can you tell me if the service still has the features I expected? I thought they were available. Thanks!

I received my order today, but the package was missing the phone charger. The tracking showed delivered, but it was not included. Can you help with this issue? Also, what happened to the original packaging?
I’m really curious if there’s a way to change my subscription plan mid-cycle. It's quite important to me, but I couldn't find the relevant information on your website.
I'm really frustrated because the app keeps crashing every time I try to log in. I depend on it for my work, and this has caused significant delays. Please help me resolve this issue quickly.

I recently purchased a gadget and it doesn’t seem to perform as expected. I had high hopes based on your advertisements, but now I feel quite upset that it isn’t working. The manual also lacks details on troubleshooting which adds to my frustration. Can someone please address this issue?
my app crashes when I try to open settings. it was fine before but now 😩. help plz.
I received the wrong item in my order. Please arrange for a refund for this mistake.

I have been attempting to access the advanced settings of my account for the past few days, but it constantly shows an error message. Additionally, it seems like every time I try to adjust my notification preferences, nothing happens, and the interface remains unresponsive. I am not sure if this is due to my browser version being slightly outdated, as I'm using an older version of Chrome, but I would appreciate any detailed troubleshooting steps you could provide to rectify this situation. Also, I have cleared my cache and cookies multiple times, but the problem persists, which is quite perplexing.
I ordered a pair of shoes but only received one. Can I get my money back for the missing one? Thanks!

I’m really struggling to log into my account. I keep getting an error message that says my credentials are incorrect, even though I’m sure they’re right. I even tried resetting my password multiple times, but the email with the reset link never shows up in my inbox or spam folder, which is quite frustrating.

Could you please clarify the specifics regarding how the pro plan operates in comparison to the business tier? I am particularly interested in understanding any potential differences in features, limitations, or overall pricing structure that might not be immediately apparent. Your assistance in shedding light on these details would be greatly appreciated.
I'm unable to reset my password as the link keeps expiring. Can you assist?
Could you clarify the differences between the standard and premium subscriptions?
I received my order, but one of the items was completely different from what I expected. I'm really upset about this mix-up, as it ruined my plans for the weekend.
I was really excited to receive my order, but when it arrived, the item was not what I expected. It’s disappointing that it didn’t match the description provided on the website.

I received my order, but there seems to be a discrepancy regarding the total items shipped. The shipment contained only one instead of the two I purchased, and I would appreciate guidance on how to initiate a refund for the missing item. Additionally, while I understand that shipping delays can occur, I believe the claim process should be straightforward and hope to resolve this matter promptly despite the complexities involved.

I've been trying to upload my project file for hours now, and each time I attempt it, I receive an error message that doesn't make sense to me. It's frustrating because I need to submit it for my deadline, but I don't know why it's failing. Can you check if there are any issues on your side that could be causing this since I followed all the instructions.
My MFA app reset after phone switch. Need help with mfa re-adding.
Hey, do you guys have any discounts for students? I heard you do, but I can't figure out how to get one. Is it even a thing?
